report_title: SkillPath Workforce Reskilling Programme — Progress Report
executive_summary: The SkillPath programme enrolled 5 employees across 5 target roles. 5 employees are progressing on schedule. 0 employees require additional support and coaching intervention.
recommendations: Increase coaching frequency for at-risk employees to bi-weekly
Consider peer-learning pairs for complex technical skills
Review learning resource quality in Phase 1 for low-engagement areas
